seeds.name: Agent Workspace Shell
seeds.useWhen: The user must keep context, active field and consequences visible together.
seeds.doNotUseWhen: The page is a simple article, linear landing page or one-context flow.

seeds.name: Split Panel
seeds.useWhen: Two related panes must remain resizable with recovery gutters.
seeds.doNotUseWhen: The second pane is truly modal or should replace the main task.

seeds.name: Design Primitives
seeds.useWhen: A target project needs shared buttons, cards, modals and radius tokens.
seeds.doNotUseWhen: A semantic component already exists for the behavior, such as a panel, drawer or inspector.

seeds.name: Hover Popover and Tooltip
seeds.useWhen: Local explanation, closed-gutter explanation or compact related-link depth is required.
seeds.doNotUseWhen: The explanation is long enough to require an inspector, sheet, drawer or body section.

seeds.name: Response Outline Rail
seeds.useWhen: A long answer, report or assistant thread needs visible navigation across sections, claims, warnings, actions and results.
seeds.doNotUseWhen: The content has fewer than three meaningful sections.

seeds.name: Article Diagram Rail
seeds.useWhen: A process, relation, direction or reasoning chain needs to stay visible near prose.
seeds.doNotUseWhen: The diagram would be decorative or duplicate the outline rail.

seeds.name: Taxonomy Map
seeds.useWhen: Canonical, candidate, alias, ambiguous, scaffold or rejected concepts must remain visible.
seeds.doNotUseWhen: The concept set is purely decorative or does not need review states.

seeds.name: Mega Menu Seed
seeds.useWhen: Tabs, route groups, template families or subdomain surfaces need visible navigation context.
seeds.doNotUseWhen: A simple dropdown or decorative menu is enough.

seeds.name: Agent Context Chat Seed
seeds.useWhen: An assistant surface must read active UI context before discussing changes.
seeds.doNotUseWhen: The chat cannot receive focus, surface or action-boundary context.

seeds.name: Public Nav Shell
seeds.useWhen: A public domain/subdomain needs consistent navigation with mobile drawer behavior.
seeds.doNotUseWhen: The target has only one surface and no adjacent routes.

seeds.name: Copy To AI Bridge
seeds.useWhen: A user needs to move prepared context into another AI tool without losing intent.
seeds.doNotUseWhen: The copy text contains private data without explicit user control.
